title.rendered: AMI MegaRAC OneTree First-to-Market on ASPEED AST2700 for 7th Gen Intel Xeon Processors

content.rendered:
AMI is pleased to announce that our next-generation BMC firmware solution, MegaRAC® OneTree™, will be available at Power-ON on the ASPEED AST27x0 DC-SCM module for 7th Gen Intel® Xeon® Processors (code-named “Diamond Rapids”). This initiative demonstrates AMI’s commitment to accelerating the design and qualification processes of next generation platforms, thereby enabling our customers to achieve superior performance and reduce the time to market.

Today, customers can access a validated MegaRAC OneTree solution on the ASPEED AST27x0 DC-SCM module, designed for 6th Gen Intel® Xeon® Processor (“Birch Stream”) platforms (“Avenue City”). This solution incorporates an enhanced OpenBMC™ base code coupled with advanced device and protocol support functionalities. As a result, Cloud vendors and Enterprise customers can strengthen their out-of-band server and infrastructure management software to improve datacenter operational efficiency while speeding up next-gen product development lifecycle and market readiness.

Why MegaRAC OneTree:

  • Expanded feature sets and modularity
  • Advanced server, device, fabric, and infrastructure management technologies
  • Industry-aligned first-to-market feature readiness
  • Developer and supply-chain focused toolsets
  • Reliability in product stability and timely project-delivery
  • Open-Source Foundation, Enterprise-Grade Execution
  • On-Demand support to minimize downtime

Stay in the loop!

Contact us for information about our upcoming OneTree release and let us know how we can partner on your upcoming compute infrastructure designs.

Intel and Xeon are registered trademarks of Intel Corporation in the US and other countries. OpenBMC is a trademark of LF Projects, LLC. All other trademarks and registered trademarks are the property of their respective owners.
